name: tavern-sse
description: Client-side companion for the tavern SSE pub/sub engine. Declarative UI behaviors for connection state, replay gaps, and topic changes.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.version: sed -i 's/@version [0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/@version '"$npm_package_version"'/' src/tavern.js && sed -i 's/@v[0-9]*\.[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/@v'"$npm_package_version"'/' README.md && git add src/tavern.js README.md

author: catgoose
